name: databricks-query-v015
description: Run a SQL query against Databricks, sanitise the returned rows for PII / cards / secrets, write the redacted rows to disk, return a chat-inline summary with finding counts. Reads DATABRICKS_SERVER_HOSTNAME / HTTP_PATH / TOKEN from the bridge process env (auto-loaded from .env.databricks).

query.description: SQL query. Free Edition workspaces have samples.bakehouse pre-populated (sales_transactions, sales_customers, media_customer_reviews, etc.).

parameters.description: Positional parameters bound to ? placeholders in the query. Leave [] if your query has no placeholders.

with.text: Databricks query returned rows; sanitiser found ${steps.sanitise.critical_count} critical + ${steps.sanitise.high_count} high finding(s); redacted output saved.
